title: Minky Bobble Remover | Lint Remover | Lint Remover for Clothes | Hand Held Fabric Shaver | Bobble Remover For Clothes | Debobbler | Lint Removers For Clothes | Battery Operated Home Gadgets |
features: PRO AND PRECISE LINT REMOVER - Our fabric shaver features a strong electric motor that powers theblades' sharp edges to allow for speedy and effective use. Bobbles are gone in seconds!
ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT LINT SHAVER - Adjustable head targets both long and short bobbles. This means you can get rid of all different sizes of excess fabric! Perfect defuzzer for clothes!
CLOTHES DEBOBBLER WITH EROGOMIC HANDLE - Our de bobbler for clothes has been constructed with a comfortable to use handle, this allows you to remove lint and excess fabric quickly!
FABRIC PROTECTOR DEBOBBLER CLOTHES SHAVER - The tight honeycomb construction of the plastic protective case helps prevent any damage to your clothes and garments! Bye Bye Bobbles!
BATTERY POWERED FABRIC SHAVER FOR CLOTHES - Our fabric shaver is powered through battery's, this allows it to be fully portable which means you can take it anywhere!
description: Product Description Minky Bobble Remover Keep your clothes fresh and looking brand new with the Minky Bobble Remover. Suitable for all clothes types, bring your fabrics back to life, without causing damage. Gently Remove Bobbles from Any Fabric For Wool Garments Refresh your cosy winter jumpers and blankets in no time. For Cotton Garments Perfect for cotton t-shirts, bedding and even cushions. Bring Clothes Back to Life Before Quickly and easily remove bobbles from your clothes, ideal for wool and cotton items. After Leaves your clothes looking brand new. Quick and Easy to Use Easy Clean Easily remove the bobble remover blades and emptying compartment to empty between uses. Battery Operated Just pop in 2 double A batteries, and off you go. Your Perfect Clothing Companion
